content: inventory scope means questions about knives the user owns. Phrases like 'my knives', 'my collection', 'do I own', 'what do I have', or bare ownership questions default to inventory.

catalog scope means questions about the full MKC model universe, including models not owned. Phrases like 'full catalog', 'what has MKC made', 'all models', or missing-model questions imply catalog or a comparison against catalog.
